title: Sensory Organ Initialization — Voice + Vision Vertical

missions.title: Environment Prep + BOM Sentinel
deliverables: epos_doctor.py — Section E added: CHECK E1 (BOM Sentinel), CHECK E2 (State Redundancy)
2 BOM-infected files detected and cleaned on M0 run

missions.title: The Ears (Groq Whisper STT + Raw Capture)
deliverables: save_raw_capture() — saves audio + metadata to context_vault/raw_captures/

missions.title: The Memory (Vault Semantic Search)
deliverables: Importable. Operational when nomic-embed-text seated on Ollama.
missions.blocker: nomic-embed-text requires Ollama pull — not yet seeded. search_vault() non-fatal fails without it.

missions.title: The Brain (Qwen3-32B Reformulation)
deliverables: JSON extraction with markdown fence stripping

missions.title: The Mouth (Piper TTS)
deliverables: Graceful fallback: returns {status: 'not_installed', fallback: 'text_only'} — no crash
Verified: fallback path works without Piper installed
missions.blocker: Piper TTS requires: pip install piper-tts + voice model download

missions.title: The Eyes (Vision Model Skeleton)
deliverables: describe_screen() returns {status: 'skeleton'} — no crash, no external dependency

missions.title: The Synapse (Full Pipeline Wiring + FastAPI)
deliverables: /app/epos/voice/api.py — FastAPI router: POST /voice/session, /voice/search, /voice/index, GET /voice/vocabulary, POST /voice/vocabulary, GET /voice/training/stats, GET /voice/audio/{session_id}
Event Bus wired: voice.session.start, voice.stt.complete, voice.reformulation.complete, voice.session.complete

pending_dependencies.name: nomic-embed-text via Ollama
pending_dependencies.action: docker compose exec epos-core ollama pull nomic-embed-text

what_went_well: All 11 Python files + vocabulary.json deployed and importable in one pass
Vocabulary corrections verified: 30 EPOS terms, case-insensitive matching, longest-first priority
Speaker graceful fallback confirmed — returns text_only status without crashing when Piper absent
Vision skeleton clean — no external dependency, passes verification immediately
Pipeline wires all 7 steps; vault_search and speak() fail silently — non-fatal per Article II
Doctor Section E added — BOM Sentinel and State Redundancy as standing health checks
BOM cleaner caught and cleaned 2 infected files on M0 execution
what_went_wrong: SCC background delegation for M1 produced a stub (shebang only) — transcriber.py written directly by Desktop CODE
SCC parallel invocation via docker compose exec is unreliable for file creation — LLM loop needs longer timeout or explicit file content passed as directive
what_was_learned: SCC directive delegation works best for reasoning tasks, not direct file creation. For precise file content, Desktop CODE writes directly from the directive spec.
Piper TTS and Ollama are infrastructure dependencies — voice pipeline is fully coded but activation requires two install steps outside the container image
Vault search is Ollama-dependent but fails non-fatally — pipeline returns empty vault_docs and proceeds to reformulation without crashing
FastAPI router pattern: APIRouter(prefix='/voice') mounts cleanly on any FastAPI app via app.include_router(voice_router)

successor_directives.title: Seed Ollama: nomic-embed-text pull
successor_directives.action: docker compose exec epos-core ollama pull nomic-embed-text
successor_directives.status: IMMEDIATE — run before next voice session
